title: skills config.json
description: User configuration for the skills CLI ($XDG_CONFIG_HOME/smartcrab-skills/config.json)

global.description: Path to the global skill store. Supports ~, $VAR, and ${VAR:-default} expansion.

project.description: Path to the per-project skill store (relative to the project root if not absolute). Supports path expansion.

default_agents.description: Agent names used when --agent is not specified. Each entry must match an agents[].name.

default_creator.description: Agent name used by 'skills create'. Must match an agents[].name. Defaults to 'claude-code'.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URI. Used by editors for autocompletion.

global_dir.description: Directory where global skills are linked/copied for this agent. Supports path expansion.

project_dir.description: Directory where project-scoped skills are linked/copied for this agent. Supports path expansion.
